en.name: Sliding Door Calculator
en.seo_title: Sliding Door Calculator — Track & Hardware | CalcToWork
en.seo_description: Calculate sliding door track, rollers and panel materials. Enter opening dimensions. Free carpentry calculator for sliding systems.
en.example_label: Estimar papel pintado necesario para superficie de 10 m.
en.result_context: La cantidad calculada de {rollos_ud} rollos (+10%) incluye 10% de merma. Ajusta segun porosidad del soporte.
en.formula_display: Formula especifica para papel-pintado - consulta documentacion tecnica.
steps: Measure the opening width and height
Sliding door panel width = opening width ÷ 2 + 50 mm overlap
Door height = opening height − 10 mm for floor clearance
Track length = opening width × 2 for bypass doors
Hardware: top-hung or bottom-rolling track, rollers, guides, handles
mistakes: Not checking if the wall has enough space for the doors to slide open
Installing the track out of level — doors will slide open or closed on their own
Forgetting the soft-close mechanism — heavy glass doors slam without it
en.description: Calculate materials for sliding door installation — track, rollers, panels, and hardware. Enter opening dimensions for accurate estimates.
en.rc: For a {ancho} m opening, each sliding door panel should be approximately {ancho_panel} m wide.
en.fd: Panel width = (opening width ÷ 2) + 0.05; Track = opening width × 2
en.el: Sliding door dimensions for a 2.4 m wide wardrobe opening
